debug_info.goal:
U : Type
A : Set U
⊢ one_to_one (HTPI.Exercises.val_image U A)

proof:
by
  fix X1 : Set A; fix X2 : Set A
  assume h : val_image A X1 = val_image A X2
  apply Set.ext
  fix x : A
  apply Iff.intro
  · assume hx : x ∈ X1
    have h1 : val_image A X1 = val_image A X2 := h
    have h2 : X1 ⊆ X2 := subset_of_val_image_eq h1
    exact h2 hx
  · assume hx : x ∈ X2
    have h1 : val_image A X2 = val_image A X1 := h.symm
    have h2 : X2 ⊆ X1 := subset_of_val_image_eq h1
    exact h2 hx
failed_attempts:
by
  define
  fix X1 : Set A; fix X2 : Set A
  assume h : val_image A X1 = val_image A X2
  apply Set.ext
  fix x : A
  apply Iff.intro
  · exact subset_of_val_image_eq h x
  · exact subset_of_val_image_eq h.symm x

by
  define
  intro X1 X2 h
  apply Set.ext
  intro x
  constructor
  · exact subset_of_val_image_eq h
  · exact subset_of_val_image_eq h.symm

by
  fix X1 : Set A; fix X2 : Set A
  assume h : val_image A X1 = val_image A X2
  apply Set.ext
  fix x : A
  apply Iff.intro
  · assume hx : x ∈ X1
    have h1 : val_image A X1 = val_image A X2 := h
    have h2 : x.val ∈ val_image A X1 := by
      define
      use x
      exact ⟨hx, rfl⟩
    rw [h1] at h2
    define at h2
    obtain ⟨y, hy, hval⟩ := h2
    have heq : x = y := Subtype.ext hval.symm
    rw [heq]
    exact hy
  · assume hx : x ∈ X2
    have h1 : val_image A X1 = val_image A X2 := h
    have h2 : x.val ∈ val_image A X2 := by
      define
      use x
      exact ⟨hx, rfl⟩
    rw [← h1] at h2
    define at h2
    obtain ⟨y, hy, hval⟩ := h2
    have heq : x = y := Subtype.ext hval.symm
    rw [heq]
    exact hy

by
  define
  intro X1 X2 h
  apply Set.ext
  intro x
  constructor
  · exact subset_of_val_image_eq h
  · exact subset_of_val_image_eq h.symm

by
  fix X1 : Set A
  fix X2 : Set A
  assume h : val_image A X1 = val_image A X2
  apply Set.ext
  fix a : A
  apply Iff.intro
  · assume ha : a ∈ X1
    have h1 : a.val ∈ val_image A X1 := by
      define
      use a
      exact ⟨ha, rfl⟩
    rw [h] at h1
    define at h1
    obtain ⟨b, hb, hbval⟩ := h1
    have hab : a = b := Subtype.ext hbval.symm
    rw [hab]
    exact hb
  · assume ha : a ∈ X2
    have h1 : a.val ∈ val_image A X2 := by
      define
      use a
      exact ⟨ha, rfl⟩
    rw [← h] at h1
    define at h1
    obtain ⟨b, hb, hbval⟩ := h1
    have hab : a = b := Subtype.ext hbval.symm
    rw [hab]
    exact hb

  fix X1 : Set A; fix X2 : Set A
  assume h : val_image A X1 = val_image A X2
  apply Set.ext
  fix x : A
  apply Iff.intro
  · assume hx : x ∈ X1
    have h1 : val_image A X1 = val_image A X2 := h
    have h2 : x.val ∈ val_image A X1 := by
      define
      use x
      exact ⟨hx, rfl⟩
    rw [h1] at h2
    define at h2
    obtain ⟨y, hy, hxy⟩ := h2
    have : x = y := Subtype.ext hxy.symm
    rw [this]
    exact hy
  · assume hx : x ∈ X2
    have h1 : val_image A X1 = val_image A X2 := h
    have h2 : x.val ∈ val_image A X2 := by

    rw [← h1] at h2

    have : x = y := Subtype.ext hxy.symm

by
  fix X1 : Set A; fix X2 : Set A
  assume h : val_image A X1 = val_image A X2
  apply Set.ext
  fix a : A
  apply Iff.intro
  · assume ha : a ∈ X1
    have h1 : a.val ∈ val_image A X1 := by
      define
      use a
      apply And.intro ha rfl
    rw [h] at h1
    define at h1
    obtain ⟨b, hb, hbeq⟩ := h1
    have : a = b := Subtype.ext hbeq.symm
    rw [this]
    exact hb
  · assume ha : a ∈ X2
    have h1 : a.val ∈ val_image A X2 := by
      define
      use a
      apply And.intro ha rfl
    rw [← h] at h1
    define at h1
    obtain ⟨b, hb, hbeq⟩ := h1
    have : a = b := Subtype.ext hbeq.symm
    rw [this]
    exact hb
